raw_response:
As the owner of Śliwka w Kompot, Variant B is significantly more useful for managing my business. While both reports correctly identify the intense competition, B provides a level of operational detail that is immediately actionable. Its analysis of specific menu prices—including my own—and local rent costs in PLN grounds the report in my day-to-day financial reality. The insight that my long queues are creating an "impatient overflow" that benefits the new Food Hall is a critical, timely threat I need to address. Furthermore, B's specific, data-backed callout of my 0% review response rate is a concrete weakness I can fix this week. Report A offers a good high-level strategic framework of an "oligopoly," but B's granular focus on pricing power, competitor menu strategies, and customer management provides superior, tangible value for running my business.

{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://www.trojmiasto.pl/", "https://www.google.com/maps/"]}
